title: Make help command-aware and side-effect free
diff_sketch: Add per-command help topics and route `philip help <command>` / `<command> --help` before command execution.

title: Reject unknown CLI flags before side effects
diff_sketch: Parse subcommand flags explicitly, return exit 2 for user-input errors, and include copy-pasteable help commands.

title: Add parseable diff result envelope
diff_sketch: Support `philip diff --json` with JSON stdout containing artifact path, schema version, comparison, and metrics.

title: Validate audit Confidence labels
diff_sketch: Reject Confidence labels that do not start with High, Medium, or Low and pin the fixture.

title: Expose machine contract and agent guide in-tool
diff_sketch: Add `philip capabilities --json` and `philip robot-docs guide`; document exit codes and structured surfaces.

title: Add the Philip agent mega-command
diff_sketch: Add `philip --robot-triage` as a JSON-only, side-effect-free status packet with CLI contract, structured surfaces, artifact-store health, latest/current diff artifact paths, discovered verification commands, recommended next commands, recovery hints, and exit codes.
